sqls.sql: SELECT gid, code, photo1, project_code, save, dept_code, use_yn, ST_AsGeoJSON(ST_Transform(geometry, 4326)) AS geojson FROM public.gis_a_layer WHERE ST_Intersects( geom, ST_Transform(ST_MakeEnvelope(?, ?, ?, ?, 4326), ST_SRID(geometry)) ) LIMIT ${limit}

SELECT f.code, f.project_code, f.survey, f.image, f.group_index, f.user_id, f.photo_direction, f.reg_dt, u.name AS user_name FROM public.field f LEFT JOIN public."user" u ON f.user_id = u.id WHERE f.code = ? AND f.use_yn = 'Y' ORDER BY f.group_index ASC, f.reg_dt ASC
UPDATE public.field SET survey = ?, project_code = ?, group_index = ?, photo_direction = ? WHERE code = ? AND image = ?
UPDATE public.field SET use_yn = 'N', mod_dt = NOW() WHERE code = ? AND image = ?
UPDATE public.field SET use_yn = 'N', mod_dt = NOW() WHERE code = ?
UPDATE public.field SET use_yn = 'N', mod_dt = NOW() WHERE code = ? AND group_index = ?
UPDATE public.field SET survey = ?, mod_dt = NOW() WHERE code = ? AND group_index = ? AND use_yn = 'Y'
SELECT DISTINCT code FROM public.field WHERE use_yn = 'Y' ORDER BY code
SELECT DISTINCT f.image FROM public.field f WHERE f.code = ? AND f.group_index = CAST(? AS VARCHAR) AND f.image IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(f.image)) > 0
